summary: Iteration 61: Testing Affiliate Link Monetization features. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed affiliate link pills with correct data-testids and tracking params. Community posts auto-detect product keywords (плочки, мивка, etc.) and store mentions (Praktiker, eMAG, etc.) to generate affiliate links with utm_source=temadom or ref=temadom tracking.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/community/posts with 'Praktiker' mention targets Praktiker store
✅ POST /api/community/posts without keywords returns empty affiliate_links
✅ Various product keywords (мивка, ламинат, боя) trigger affiliate links
✅ GET /api/community/posts returns posts with affiliate_links field
✅ Affiliate URLs contain correct tracking params (utm_source=temadom, ref=temadom)
✅ Existing test post found with affiliate links
✅ 3 affiliate link pills found with data-testid='aff-link-{postId}-{index}' pattern
✅ ExternalLink icons (svg) present inside affiliate pills
✅ Affiliate pill example: 'плочки Praktiker' with utm_source=temadom tracking
✅ Affiliate pill example: 'плочки eMAG' with ref=temadom tracking
✅ AI Designer page budget input working (placeholder 'Напр. 5000')
critical_code_review_comments: 1. ✅ AFFILIATE_CONFIG exists with ref_id='temadom' and 9 stores (Praktiker, Jysk, Mr.Bricolage, HomeMax, Bauhaus, eMAG, IKEA, Teknoimpex, Technomarket)
2. ✅ make_affiliate_url() function adds tracking params based on store config

3. ✅ Community POST auto-detects product keywords: плочки, фаянс, теракот, мивка, тоалетна, душ, вана, батерия, смесител, бойлер, ламинат, паркет, боя, шкаф, мебели, осветление, лампа, огледало, кухня, климатик, радиатор
4. ✅ Community POST auto-detects store mentions: praktiker, jysk, mr.bricolage, мр бриколаж, homemax, хоум макс, bauhaus, баухаус, ikea, икеа, emag, имаг, teknoimpex, technomarket, техномаркет
5. ✅ Frontend CommunityPage.jsx imports ExternalLink icon from lucide-react
6. ✅ Affiliate link pills have data-testid='aff-link-{postId}-{index}' for testing
7. ✅ Budget materials in AI Designer include affiliate tracking in product_url
8. ✅ Non-intrusive design - only first matched keyword generates links, max 2 stores
seed_data_creation: Created test posts with product mentions during testing (auto-deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified affiliate link monetization: 1) AFFILIATE_CONFIG at server.py line ~82 with ref_id='temadom', 2) make_affiliate_url() at line ~97 adds tracking params, 3) Community posts auto-detect product/store keywords at line ~5158, 4) Frontend shows affiliate pills with ExternalLink icons and correct data-testids. Product scraping is still MOCKED for most stores (/api/scrape/*).

make_affiliate_url.behavior: Adds utm_source=temadom or ref=temadom based on store config

budget_materials_affiliate.note: product_url includes affiliate tracking via make_affiliate_url()

mocked_apis.Product scraping: /api/scrape/* - scraping logic is placeholder for most stores
